completed_work: Added ops/db/bootstrap/001_runtime_base.sql with minimal cross-service prerequisite tables.
Added scripts/compose-db-bootstrap.sh to apply ordered canonical SQL migrations with ON_ERROR_STOP=1.

risk_notes: The bootstrap service mounts the repo read-only and applies schema only after PostgreSQL health passes.
No Go runtime repository code or dependency manifests changed.
summary: Implemented a one-shot compose database bootstrap for clean runtime schema provisioning and verified acquisition, notification, cadence, and postback empty-database paths.
